controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, Urban Co-operative Banks shall mean Primary Co-operative
Banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as per the audited balance sheet as of 31st march of the immediately preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
The deposits referred to above shall be reckoned as per the audited balance
sheet as of 31st March of the immediately preceding financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as per the audited balance sheet as of 31st march of the immediately preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank for inclusion in the second schedule to the reserve bank of india act, 1934: (1) maintenanc
controls.control_description:
In terms of clause (a) of sub-section (6) of section 42 of the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934 and the Government of India notification F.No.3/16/2023-AC
dated September 04, 2023 (published in Gazette of India on September 23,
2023), the licensed UCBs (except Salary Earners' Banks), which are in
compliance with Eligibility Criteria for Business Authorisation (as defined in
Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Branch Authorisation)
Directions, 2025) and the following additional norms, may apply to the Regional
Office concerned of the Reserve Bank for inclusion in the Second Schedule to
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934:
(1) Maintenance of minimum deposits required for categorisation as a Tier 3
UCB for two consecutive years by a UCB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank for inclusion in the second schedule to the reserve bank of india act, 1934: (1) maintenanc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the assessed financials and findings of the rbi inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the latest
controls.control_description:
The above information shall be based on the assessed financials and findings of
the RBI inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the latest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be based on the assessed financials and findings of the rbi inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the latest

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application with the following documents: (1) copy of the resolution passed by the annual general body / board of directors to make an appl
controls.control_description:
An eligible UCB shall submit its application with the following documents:
(1) Copy of the resolution passed by the Annual General Body / Board of
Directors to make an application to RBI for inclusion in the Second Schedule
to the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 and containing the name(s) of bank
official(s) authorized to correspond with RBI in this regard;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application with the following documents: (1) copy of the resolution passed by the annual general body / board of directors to make an appl
